info.title: Pydio Cells API
info.description: REST API for Pydio Cells, the open-source file sharing and collaboration platform. Provides 248+ endpoints covering tree/file operations, user management, ACLs, roles, workspaces, sharing, activity streams, configuration, search, jobs/scheduler, authentication, frontend, and meta services.

get.description: Retrieve metadata (stat) for a file or folder.

post.summary: Create a temporary selection of nodes

bearerAuth.description: Personal Access Token or OAuth2 JWT token
